## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Change Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Security hardening

## Validation

- [ ] Backend lint (`ruff check backend`)
- [ ] Backend tests (`pytest -q backend`)
- [ ] Frontend lint/build (`npm run lint && npm run build` in `frontend`)
- [ ] CI secret scan passes

## Security Review

- [ ] No secrets added
- [ ] Key Vault / managed identity usage preserved
- [ ] Auth/RBAC impact reviewed

## Deployment Notes

Any infra, config, or migration steps required.

## Checklist

- [ ] Docs updated
- [ ] Breaking changes called out
- [ ] Linked issue (if applicable)
